mnemonics: Never Eat Soggy Waffles (for Neural Networks, Ensembles, SVMs, and Word Embeddings - common exam topics)
Bias is a Bummer, Variance is a Villain (to remember the trade-off)
keyPoints: Understand the Bias-Variance Tradeoff and how different algorithms manage it.
Be able to compare and contrast supervised vs. unsupervised learning with examples.
Know how to evaluate model performance using appropriate metrics (Precision, Recall, F1-score, ROC-AUC).
commonMistakes: Confusing classification accuracy with precision/recall, especially for imbalanced datasets.
Using linear regression for a classification problem instead of logistic regression.
Overfitting the model to the training data and not validating on a hold-out test set.
